docTitle: Bible mu Muvungu Umue · Kubangila ku Difuka too ne ku Ekeleziya

share.title: Bible mu Muvungu Umue
share.text: Mu muvungu umue, mona muyuki munene wa Bible — ne bua tshinyi Yesu wakalua.

epochs.title: Difuka
epochs.events: Matuku asamba a difuka, muntu mufuka mu tshimfuanyi tshia Nzambi, dikisha dia Sabato
epochs.q: Kale ku tshibangidilu Nzambi wakafuka diulu ne buloba.
epochs.christ: Buloba buakafukibua ku “Dî.” Lumu Luimpe lua Yone ludi luamba ne Dî edi ndiye Yesu mene (Yone 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Bible kayitu mubangila ne dielangana dia meji, kadi mubangila ne dijadika: “Kale ku tshibangidilu Nzambi…” Buloba kabuena bualu bua tshipupu, kadi mudimu wa Nzambi udi ne muoyo.

  • Tshimfuanyi tshia Nzambi · munkatshi mua bifukibua bionso, anu muntu udi mufukibua bua kuikala bu Nzambi — bua kumumanya ne kulama buloba.
  • Dikisha · dikisha dia dituku dia muanda mutekete didi dileja ne bionso bivua bikumbane ne bivua mu ditalala (shalom): “tshivua tshimpe.”
  • Edene · buloba kumpala kua kubujimibua, muaba uvua Nzambi ne bantu benda hamue.

epochs.title: Dipona
epochs.one: Bubi buakabuela, ne diumvuangana dia bantu ne Nzambi diakatshibuka.
epochs.events: Didia dia mamuma akangidibua, dihatudibua mu Edene, dilua dia lufu ne dia mudimu mukole
epochs.q: Nenteke lukuna hankatshi hebe ne mukashi … neakukume ku mutu kuebe.
epochs.christ: Mulayi wa kumpala wa lumu luimpe, muhibue diakamue hakapua dipona: “muana wa mukashi” neakume ku mutu kua nyoka — eu ndiye Yesu (Genese 3:15; Lomo 16:20; Galatia 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Ku dibenga ditumikila dia kusua “kuikala bu Nzambi,” bubi buakabuela mu buloba. Tshipeta katshiena anu dishipa dikenshi, kadi dishihula dia diumvuangana.

  • Diumvuangana dishihula · ne Nzambi (disokoka), ne bakuabo (dieha muntu mukuabo dibanza), ne difukibua (mieba ne mudimu mukole).
  • Lufu · didimuija dia se: “neufue bushuwa” didi dilua bulelela.
  • Genese 3:15 · kadi munkatshi mua dilumbuluisha, mulayi wa lusungu udi ulua kumpala. Bena kumanya badi babidika “protoevangelium (lumu luimpe lua kumpala).”
epochs.next: Mpindieu Nzambi udi ubikila muntu umue bua kubangisha lusungu…

epochs.title: Bankambua
epochs.one: Nzambi udi ulaya Abalahama ne, “Newikale tshijiba tshia disanka.”
epochs.events: Tshipungidi tshia Abalahama, dijika dia Isaka, bana dikumi ne babidi ba Yakoba, Yosefe udi ubanda mu bukokeshi mu Ejipitu
epochs.q: Nenkuvuishe tshisamba tshinene … Bisamba bionso bia ha buloba nebisanke bua bualu buebe.
epochs.christ: Mulayi wa se bisamba bionso nebisanke udi ukumbana mu Yesu, muana wa Abalahama (Galatia 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Nzambi udi ubanga kujikija ditshiona dia bantu bonso ku dibikila muntu umue, Abalahama. Tshia ku mutshima ntshipungidi (mulayi) — tshisamba tshinene, buloba, ne “disanka bua bisamba bionso.”

  • Ditabusha · Abalahama wakitabusha mulayi uvua kayiyi umueneka, ne diakambidibua kuandi bu buakane (Genese 15:6).
  • Isaka ne Yakoba · mulayi udi upita; Yakoba (Isalele) udi ulela bisa dikumi ne bibidi.
  • Yosefe · uvua mupanyibua kudi bana babo kadi wakabandishibua mu bukokeshi — “Nzambi wakasua kuenza bimpe” (Genese 50:20).
epochs.next: Kunyima kua Yosefe, dîku didi dipuekela mu Ejipitu — diakalua bahika…

epochs.title: Dipatuka ne Tshihela
epochs.one: Nzambi wakahandulula bantu bavua bahika, wakabavuisha bantu bandi.
epochs.events: Bipupu dikumi, Pasaka, dipita mu Mbuu Mukunze, Mikenshi dikumi ku Sinai, ntenta wa dikumbi, bidimu 40 mu tshihela
epochs.q: Nennuangate bu bantu banyi ne meme nengikale Nzambi wenu.
epochs.christ: Pasaka — muaba uvua mashi a muana wa mukoko ahindja lufu — udi uleja Yesu, muana wetu wa mukoko wa Pasaka, mupopelelibue bua tuetu (1 Kolinto 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Lusungu lunene lua Dipungilu Dikulukulu. Isalele uvua muhika udi upeta budikadidi ku bukole bua Nzambi, udi uvuisha bantu bandi.

  • Pasaka · nzubu uvua ne mashi a muana wa mukoko ku tshiibi udi upitshibua kudi lufu — tshilejilu tshia mafutu onso a kumpala.
  • Mbuu Mukunze · lusungu hatshidi tshikadilu tshijika; “dipita ku dimue ditshia” didi tshimanyinu tshia tshibangidilu tshihia.
  • Tshipungidi tshia Sinai · ku Mikenshi badi balongela bua kuikala bantu ba Nzambi.
  • Ntenta wa dikumbi · muaba mutoke uvua Nzambi usombela munkatshi mua bantu bandi — tshikuabidi tshia “Imanuele.”
  • Bidimu 40 · dibenga ditumikila didi dilengeja tshikondo tshijima mu tshihela, kadi Nzambi udi ushala hehi ne mana ne ditu dia ditshima ne kapia.
epochs.next: Bimane ku mpenyi wa buloba buvua bulaya, badi badilongolola bua kubuela…

epochs.title: Dikuata ne Balumbuluishi
epochs.one: Bakapeta buloba, kadi pavuabo kabayi ne mukelenge muntu yonso wakenza muvuaye musue.
epochs.people: Yoshua; balumbuluishi bu Gideона ne Sansona; Luta
epochs.events: Dipona dia Yeliko, disomba mu Kanana, tshilengelu tshia bubi–dilumbuluisha–lusungu
epochs.q: Mu matuku au kamuakadi mukelenge mu Isalele; muntu ne muntu wakenza anu malu akadi mimpe ku mesu kuandi.
epochs.christ: Ku dîku dia Luta kudi kufuma Davidi, ne ku dîku dia Davidi kudi kufuma Yesu (Matayo 1). Nansha mu tshiyongolo, dîku dia Masiya didi ditungunuka.
epochs.detail:
Ku Yoshua badi babuela mu buloba buvua bulaya, kadi pavuabo basomba badi bahua Nzambi lukasa. Mukanda wa Balumbuluishi udi tshilengelu tshimue tshipingana.

  • Tshilengelu tshia kupuekela · bubi → dikenga → diela dia kahadi → mulumbuluishi udi usungila → bubi kabidi. Tshidi tshienda tshibiha.
  • Balumbuluishi · Gideона, Sansona, Debola — basungidi ba tshikondo, bantu ba bukole kadi ne mapanga.
  • Luta · muyuki mutoke wa lulamatu mu tshikondo tshia mîdima; mukashi muenyi udi ubuela mu dîku dia Davidi (ne dia Yesu).
epochs.next: Bantu badi bela ne, “Tuhe mukelenge petu!”…

epochs.title: Bukelenge Buvuangane
epochs.one: Nzambi udi ulaya Davidi ne, “Nkuasa webe neushale tshiendelele.”
epochs.events: Mukelenge wa kumpala Shaulu, Davidi ne Goliata, tshipungidi tshia Davidi, Solomo udi wibaka ntempelo
epochs.q: Nsubu webe ne bukelenge buebe nebujadikibue ku mesu kuebe tshiendelele; nkuasa webe wa butumbi neajadikibue tshiendelele.
epochs.christ: “Nkuasa wa tshiendelele” udi ukumbana mu Yesu, muana wa Davidi — ke bualu kai badi bamubidika ne “Muana wa Davidi” (Luka 1:32-33; Matayo 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Tshikondo tshimpe tshia Isalele, mukokeshibue kudi bakelenge basatu.

  • Shaulu · mukelenge uvua bantu balomba; tshibangidilu tshimpe tshibutshibue kudi dibenga ditumikila.
  • Davidi · “muntu udi muanji ku mutshima wa Nzambi.” Udi utshimuna Goliata ne uvuisha Yelushalema tshimenga. Udi wenza bubi bunene (Bateseba) kadi udi ukudimuna mutshima (Misambu 51).
  • Tshipungidi tshia Davidi (2 Samuele 7) · Nzambi udi ulaya bua kujadika dîku dia Davidi tshiendelele — muji munene wa ditekemena dia Masiya.
  • Solomo · ku tshikondo tshia meji ne bubanji bunene udi wibaka ntempelo, kadi ku ndekelu udi ukudimukila ku mpingu.
epochs.next: Kunyima kua Solomo, bukelenge budi butshibuka mu bibidi…

epochs.title: Bukelenge Buvuatshibuka
epochs.one: Butshibuka mu sud (Yuda) ne mu nord (Isalele), tshisamba tshidi tshipuekela ku dishiha.
epochs.people: Bakelenge ba makelenge abidi; baprofete bu Eliya, Yeshaya, Yelemiya
epochs.events: Bukelenge budi butshibuka, dishuena dia mpingu didi disambakana, baprofete badi badimuija
epochs.q: Nunku Bena Isalele bakatombokela ba mu nsubu wa Davidi tô ne ku didiku edi.
epochs.christ: Ku tshikondo etshi baprofete badi bamba bua dilua dia Masiya ne dijinguluka bikole (Yeshaya 9:6; Yeshaya 53).
epochs.detail:
Ku matuku a muana wa Solomo bukelenge budi butshibuka: bukelenge bua nord bua Isalele (bisa dikumi, tshimenga Samalea) ne bukelenge bua sud bua Yuda (bisa bibidi, tshimenga Yelushalema).

  • Isalele (nord) · bakelenge bonso badi bashuena mpingu; budi bupona kudi Ashulu mu 722 KKY.
  • Yuda (sud) · dîku dia Davidi didi ditungunuka, ne bakelenge bimpe bbatekete bu Hezekiya ne Yoshiya, kadi bujima budi bupuekela.
  • Baprofete · Eliya, Amosa, Yeshaya, Yelemiya badi bela ne, “pinganai!” Mêyi a Masiya adi avula bikole muaba eu (“mupika udi ukenga” wa Yeshaya 53).
epochs.next: Ku ndekelu dilumbuluisha diakambibua didi dilua — badi babahanga mu bupika…

epochs.title: Bupika
epochs.one: Tshisamba tshidi tshibutuka ne bantu badi bahangibua mu matunga a benyi.
epochs.events: Isalele udi upona kudi Ashulu (722), Yuda udi upona kudi Babulona ne ntempelo udi ubutudibua (586)
epochs.q: Hatuakadi hehi ne misulu ya mu Babulona, tuakashikamaku, bulelela, tuakadila, hatuakavuluka Siona.
epochs.christ: Mu didishala dijima Yelemiya udi ulaya tshipungidi tshihia (Yelemiya 31:31) — tshipungidi tshijadikishibua kudi Yesu ku Didia dia Ndekelu.
epochs.detail:
Didimuija didi dikumbana. Ntempelo udi uhia ne bantu badi bahangibua mu Babulona — bajimija buloba, mukelenge, ne ntempelo: tshikondo tshibi kumpita yonso.

  • Mapona abidi · Isalele (Ashulu, 722 KKY) ne Yuda (Babulona, 586 KKY).
  • Danyele · tshilejilu tshia ditabusha nansha mu tshibote tshia bena mpingu (lubuku lua ntambue); udi umona bikena bia “bukelenge bua tshiendelele” buvua bulua.
  • Tshikenketshi tshia ditekemena · tshikena tshia mifuba miuma idi ipingana ne muoyo (Ezekiele 37) ne “tshipungidi tshihia” tshia Yelemiya tshidi tshileja tshikondo tshilualua mu mîdima.
epochs.next: Kunyima kua bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, Nzambi udi unzulula nshila — badi bapingana kuabo…

epochs.title: Dipingana
epochs.one: Badi bapingana ne wibaka ntempelo ne bimanu kabidi.
epochs.events: Dipingana ku dîyi dia Kulosa, dibaka dia ntempelo, dilongolola dia bimanu bia Yelushalema, dipingana dia Dîyi
epochs.q: Bualu bua disanka dia Yehowa mbukole buenu.
epochs.christ: Malaki, mukanda wa ndekelu wa Dipungilu Dikulukulu, udi ujika ne dileja dia muntu wa kulongolola nshila wa Masiya: “Ndi ntuma messager wanyi” (Malaki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Ku dîyi dia mukelenge wa Pelesia Kulosa (538 KKY) dipingana didi dibanga. Mu tubita tusatu badi bapingana ne wibaka tshivua tshibutuka.

  • Zelubabele · udi wibaka ntempelo (tshijika mu 516 KKY).
  • Esela · udi ulongesha Dîyi kabidi ne usonsoluela ditabusha.
  • Nehemiya · udi wibaka bimanu bia Yelushalema mu matuku 52.
  • Estere · udi usungila Bena Yuda mu Pelesia ku dibutudibua — “bua tshikondo etshi.”
  • Dijinga diditshidiku · ntempelo udi muimane, kadi kakuena mukelenge bu Davidi. Bantu badi bindila Masiya.
epochs.next: Panyima apa… bu diulu didihudika, bidimu 400 bidi bipita.

epochs.title: Bidimu bia Dipuwa
epochs.one: Bidimu 400 kabiyi ne dîyi dia muprofete — kadi tshibase tshivua tshilongololibua mu dipuwa.
epochs.events: Pelesia → Geleka → budikadidi bua Bena Makabe → bukokeshi bua Loma
epochs.q: Kadi hakakumbana tshikondo, Nzambi wakatuma Muana wandi, muledibue kudi mukashi.
epochs.christ: “Dilongolola tshibase” edi dionso diakadi mudimu wa Nzambi bua Yesu alue anu “pakakumbana tshikondo.”
epochs.detail:
Kubangila ku Malaki too ne ku Dipungilu Dihia, bidimu katataka 400 bidi bipita kabiyi ne Dîyi dihia. Kadi kunyima kua malu a buloba Nzambi uvua ulongolola nshila wa lumu luimpe.

  • Makokeshi adi ashintuluka · Pelesia → Geleka (Alesандere, 333 KKY) → Bena Topolemi ne Bena Seleko → ditomboka dia Bena Makabe (167 KKY) → Loma (63 KKY).
  • Tshigeleka · dikuata dia Alesандere diakavuisha tshigeleka muakulu wa bonso; Dipungilu Dikulukulu diakakudimunyibua mu tshigeleka (Septuaginta), kulongolola nshila bua lumu luimpe lutangalake lukasa.
  • Njila ne ditalala dia Loma · njila milengeje ne “Pax Romana” bidi bilua njila ya mudimu wa diambila.
  • Nsunagoga ne bisumbu · dilongesha mu nsunagoga didi dianyisha; Bafalише ne Basaduke badi balua; ne dijinga dia Masiya didi dikola.
epochs.next: Pashishe dipuwa didi dishihuka — ku ndekelu, udi ulua.

epochs.title: Dilua dia Yesu
epochs.one: Masiya muvuabo balaya wakalua, wakafua, ne wakabika.
epochs.people: Yesu, bayidi dikumi ne babidi, Yone Mubatiji
epochs.events: Dilua dia mu buloba, mudimu wandi ne dilongesha ne bishima, lufu ku mutshi mutshiamakane, dibika ku dituku disatu
epochs.q: Dî diakakudimuka muntu, diakuikala munkatshi muetu tshituha … diule tente ne ngasa ne bulelela.
epochs.christ: Muana wa mukashi (tshibase 2), disanka dia Abalahama (3), muana wa mukoko wa Pasaka (4), mukelenge wa tshiendelele wa Davidi (6), tshipungidi tshihia (8) — bionso bidi bikumbana mu muntu umue, Yesu: muprofete, muakuidi, ne mukelenge wetu mulelela.
epochs.detail:
Dipuwa didi dishihuka; Muvuabo balaya udi ulua. Malumu Luimpe anayi adi atela bumanyi bua muoyo, lufu, ne dibika dia Yesu ku madia anayi.

  • Dilua dia mu buloba · Nzambi udi ulua muntu (Imanuele, “Nzambi udi netu”), mu muaba wa kuhuekela wa Beteleheme.
  • Mudimu · udi ulongesha bukelenge bua Nzambi, usalakana basama, ubikila babi. “Wakamona meme wakamona Tatu.”
  • Mutshi mutshiamakane · udi ufuta tshia bubi ne lufu biakaluila ku dipona (tshibase 2). Muana wa mukoko wa Pasaka mulelela.
  • Dibika · pakabikaye ku dituku disatu, udi ushiha bukole bua bubi, lufu, ne Satana — kale ku mutshi “Hakadiumushileye makelenge ne makokeshi, wakamuenesha hatoke to, wakâkoka” (Kolosai 2:15).

Nunku Yesu ndiye muprofete wetu mulelela (uleja nshila wa kuya kudi Nzambi), muakuidi wetu mulelela (ufutshila bubi ne mubidi wandi), ne mukelenge wetu mulelela (utshimuna bubi, lufu, ne Satana ne ukokesha tshiendelele).
epochs.next: Yesu mubishibue udi utuma bayidi bandi mu buloba…

epochs.title: Tshibangidilu tshia Ekeleziya
epochs.one: Nyuma udi ulua, ne lumu luimpe ludi lutangalaka too ne ku kunfudilu kua buloba.
epochs.events: Nyuma muhuekeshibue ku Pasaka wa Bena Yuda, ekeleziya udi ulelibua, lumu luimpe ludi lutangalaka kubangila ku Yelushalema too ne ku Loma munkatshi mua dikenga
epochs.q: Nuenu nenuangate bukole, hanuhuekela Nyuma Muimpe hamʼbidi henu … ne kunfudilu kua buloba.
epochs.christ: Muyuki eu utshidi utungunuka too ne lelu. Bible udi ujika ne mulayi wa se Yesu neapingane ne neavuishe bionso bihia (Buakabuluibua 21).
epochs.detail:
Kunyima kua Yesu kubandaye, Nyuma muvuabo balaya udi ulua ku Pasaka ne ekeleziya udi ulelibua. Lumu luimpe ludi lutangalaka bikole.

  • Dituku dia Pasaka · Nyuma udi uvuisha bayidi bavua ne buowa bamanyi ba dikima.
  • Petelo · udi wambila Bena Yuda lumu luimpe mu Yelushalema.
  • Paulo · kubangila ku mukengeshi too ne ku mupostolo, ukunyina ekeleziya mu buloba bua bisamba bia bende ne ufunda mikanda.
  • Too ne ku kunfudilu kua buloba · Yelushalema → Yudaya → Samalea → Loma. Mulayi wa “bisamba bionso” muvuabo balaya Abalahama udi ulua bulelela.
  • Ne tuetu · muyuki kawena ujika; udi utungunuka too ne ku dipingana dia Yesu ne diulu dihia ne buloba buhia.
epochs.next: Kadi muyuki kawena ujika muaba eu…

epochs.title: Dipingana dia Bionso
epochs.one: Yesu udi upingana ne uvuisha bionso bihia.
epochs.events: Dipingana dia kabidi, dilumbuluisha dia ndekelu, dijika dia bubi·lufu·binsonshi, diulu dihia ne buloba buhia
epochs.q: Yeye neakuhule tshinsonshi tshionso ku mesu kuabo; ne lufu kaluena luikalaku kabidi; madilu kêna ikalaku kabidi, nasha muadi, nasha kanyinganyinga kabidi.
epochs.christ: Edene wa difuka dia kumpala udi upingajibua ku ndekelu bu “Yelushalema muhia.” Nzambi udi usombela ne bantu bandi tshiendelele — dikumbana dia Imanuele (Buakabuluibua 21:3; Matayo 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Bible kawena ujika ku tshikondo tshia ekeleziya. Mukanda wandi wa ndekelu, Buakabuluibua, udi uleja Yesu upingana bua kukumbaja bionso.

  • Dipingana dia kabidi · mukelenge muvuabo balaya udi upingana mu butumbi.
  • Ditshimuna dia ndekelu · Satana ne lufu bidi bishipibua tshiendelele, ne Kilisto udi ukokesha bu Mukelenge wa bakelenge (1 Kolinto 15:25-26; Buakabuluibua 20:10).
  • Dilumbuluisha ne dibika · malu mabi onso adi ololodibua, ne bafue badi babishibua.
  • Diulu dihia ne buloba buhia · bubi, lufu, binsonshi, ne kanyinganyinga bidi bijimina tshiendelele (Buakabuluibua 21:4).
  • Edene mupingajibue · mu “Yelushalema muhia” muimpe kuhita tshibangidilu, Nzambi udi usombela ne bantu bandi tshiendelele — muaba uvua Bible mujima uya.

Nunku mpindieu ntshikondo tshia “tshikadi, kadi katshianjile kukumbana”: mu Yesu lusungu luakadi lujika, kadi dikumbana diandi ditshidi diindidibua.
epochs.next: Nunku muyuki eu mujima udi umvuija tshinyi bua “meme”?

core.title: Bubi bua tshibangidilu — kakuena muakane
core.body: Ditshiona kadiena “bienzedi bibi tutekete” kadi muji wa mutshima. Kubangila ku Adama, muntu yonso udi uledibua muinshi mua bubi ne kena mua kufika kudi Nzambi ye nkayende.
core.vtext: Kakuena muntu udi muakane, nasha umue … Bualu bua bonso bakenza malu mabi, ne badi bahanga kuheta butumbi kudi Nzambi.

core.title: Mikenshi kayena mua kunsungila
core.body: Mikenshi kayena tshibandaminu kadi tshimanyinunu. Pawenza budikutshishi bukole, idi ikuleja muwapanga bikole. Mudimu wayi nkutufikisha kudi Kilisto.
core.vtext: Ku mikenshi kudi kufuma dijingulula dia bubi … mikenshi yakalua ndeshi wetu wa kutufikisha kudi Kilisto.

core.title: Ku ngasa — dipa, kadi mudimu nansha
core.body: Lusungu kalena difutu dia midimu yuvua uenza, kadi dipa dia tshianana kudi badi kabayi bakumbane. Nunku kakuena muntu udi mua kuditumbisha.
core.vtext: Nudi basungidibue ku ngasa bua ditabusha … kadiena difuma ku midimu, bua muntu kaditumbishi.

core.title: Mubingishibue ku ditabusha
core.body: Ki mbua kuenza mikenshi, kadi bua ditabusha mu Yesu Kilisto, udi ubadibua bu muakane — muvuadidibue ki mbuakane buebe kadi buandi.
core.vtext: Bualu bua tuakabingishibua ku ditabusha, tuikale ne ditalala ne Nzambi … kakuena muntu wabingishibua bua kuenza kua mikenshi kadi anu ku ditabusha dia mu Yesu Kilisto.

core.title: Bible udi uleja Yesu
core.body: Bible kawena mukanda wa bantu banene anyi wa didikuatshisha. Kubangila ku Genese too ne ku Buakabuluibua, dihu dionso didi diamba bua muntu umue — Yesu Kilisto.
core.vtext: Malu au kabidi adi angamba … wakabajinguluila malu akafundabo mu Mukanda wa Nzambi wonso bualu buandi.

core.title: Bukelenge bua Nzambi — mukenji munene wa Yesu
core.body: Tshiena tshivua Yesu walongesha bikole. Bukokeshi bua Nzambi bu Mukelenge buakabuela mu buloba ne Yesu ne nebukumbane pakapinganaye. Ku mutshi wandi ne ku dibika diandi, Yesu ndiye Mukelenge mulelela watshimuna bubi, lufu, ne Satana.
core.vtext: Matuku akukumbana, bukelenge bua Nzambi budi hehi; kudimunai mitshima yenu, nuitabushe lumu luimpe.

core.title: Lumu luimpe — wakajikija bionso
core.body: Difutu dia bubi dimvua tshiyi mua kufuta, Yesu wakadifuta muaba wanyi ku mutshi, ne ku dibika wakatshimuna lufu. Tshiena ngeyemena ku “enza ebi” kadi ku “buakushika.”
core.vtext: Bualu buakushika … Hatutshivua bantu babi, Kilisto wakatufuka.

mis.w: “Bua tshinyi Nzambi wakafuka muntu uvua mua kuenza bubi? Kabivua bimpe kabiyi mufuke?”
mis.t: Nzambi wakafuka buloba ne muntu ki mbua dipanga kampanda, kadi bua dinanga didi diula. Kufuka muntu bu muntu udi mua kuikala ne diumvuangana ne Nzambi ndinanga mene. Ne nansha dibuela dia bubi kadivua hambelu wa malu a lusungu lua Nzambi (Efeso 1:4-5). Tshibase tshia kumpala tshia Bible katshiena dilumbuluisha kadi dinanga.

mis.w: “Kuhangibua ne kuhebua lufu anu bua kudia muma umue — kena Nzambi mukole bikole anyi?”
mis.t: Dihatudibua mu Edene divua dilumbuluisha ne, pamue, luse. Bua kudia ku mutshi wa muoyo ne kuikala ne muoyo tshiendelele mu tshikadilu etshi tshishihula, tshitshibukile Nzambi, kuvua kushala bukuatshibue mu dikenga tshiendelele (Genese 3:22). Kuitabuja lufu kuakanzulula nshila wa dipingana, ne muaba au mene Nzambi wakalaya Musungidi (Genese 3:15). Dinanga divua kale munkatshi mua dilumbuluisha.

mis.w: “Abalahama wakasungudibua bualu uvua ne ditabusha dinene — kabena bantu bonso ba mu Bible balume balelela anyi?”
mis.t: Abalahama wakashima ne wakela mpata; Yakoba uvua mudinganyi. Nzambi kakabikila bantu “bakumbane” kadi bantu ba mapanga, ku ngasa. Bualu kabuena buimpe buabo kadi dinanga dilelela dia Nzambi (Dutelonome 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Kena mikenshi (Mikenshi dikumi) tshiteta tshiudi ne bua kupita bua kusungidibua anyi?”
mis.t: Nzambi wakabasungila kumpala kua kubaha mikenshi. Nansha Mikenshi dikumi idi ibangila ne dijadika dia lusungu: “Ndi bianyi Yehowa, Nzambi webe, wakakuhatula mu buloba bua Ejipitu” (Ekisode 20:2). Mikenshi kayena se “itumikila bua usungidibue,” kadi dilongolola dia dinanga bua muvua bantu basungidibue ne bua kusombela (Dutelonome 7:7-9). Ngasa idi yenda kumpala; dileja ditumikila ndiandamuna.

mis.w: “Dikuata dia Kanana divua dishipangana dia lukunyi — Nzambi wa Dipungilu Dikulukulu mukole bushuwa.”
mis.t: Edi ndialu dikole didi kadiyi mua kujikidibua mu dîyi dimue. Kadi Bible kawena uleja edi bu lukunyi lua tshianana kadi bu dilumbuluisha kunyima kua bidimu bia bungi bia lutulu ku bubi bukole (kusangisha dishipa dia bana) (Genese 15:16; Dutelonome 9:4-5; Lewitiki 18:24-25). Nzambi kena uhita lukasa nansha mu dilumbuluisha, ne udi wakidila ne disanka badi bamuluila — nansha benyi bu Lahaba ne Luta (Yoshua 6:25; Luta 4:13-17).

mis.w: “Davidi uvua mulume mulelela kayi ne dipanga — ke bualu kai babamubikila ‘muntu udi muanji ku mutshima wa Nzambi.’”
mis.t: Davidi wakenza masandi ne nansha dishipa. “Muntu udi muanji ku mutshima wa Nzambi” kabivua biamba kayi ne dipanga, kadi uvua kayi musokoke bubi buandi — wakakudimuna mutshima bushuwa ne wakapingana kudi Nzambi (Misambu 51). Dinanga dia Nzambi kadiena dihua nansha udi upona bikole.

mis.w: “Muprofete mmumanyi udi wamba malu atshilualua / Nzambi wa Dipungilu Dikulukulu udi anu ne tshiji.”
mis.t: Tshia ku mutshima tshia muprofete kena “kuamba malu atshilualua” kadi dilomba dia mutshima dia Nzambi: “Pingana, ndalomba.” Nansha didimuija dia dilumbuluisha kadiena dikeba kubutula kadi kukudimuna bantu bua kubapesha muoyo — “tshiena ne disanka bua lufu lua muntu mubi” (Ezekiele 33:11).

mis.w: “Bupika budi bujadika ne Nzambi wakahua Isalele bushuwa.”
mis.t: Bupika kabuvua dihua kadi dikenga dia dilongolola dia Tatu kudi muanende munanga (Ebelu 12:6). Nzambi kakaya; uvua ne Danyele munkatshi mua bupika ne wakalaya, “Ndi mumanye meji andi nnuelela, adi meji a kunuvuisha ditalala, kaena a kunuvuisha diyoyo; adi bua kunuha ditekemena” (Yelemiya 29:11).

mis.w: “Bua bidimu 400 kabiyi ne dîyi, Nzambi uvua muye anyi uvua ukisha.”
mis.t: Dipuwa kadiena dipanga. Kakuamba anu, kadi mu tshikondo etshi tshionso uvua unyungisha makokeshi, miakulu, ne njila bua kulongolola tshibase tshia lusungu. Mu tshikondo tshia dipuwa bikole, Nzambi uvua wenza mudimu bikole, mu dinanga (Galatia 4:4).

mis.w: “Yesu uvua anu mulongeshi umue muimpe wa bikadilu / mutshi wuvua ditshimunyibua dia kanyinganyinga.”
mis.t: Yesu wakamba ne ye mene ndiye Nzambi (Yone 8:58), ne mutshi kauvua tshipupu anyi ditshimunyibua kadi dinanga dilongolola. Kavua mukokibua ku bukole; wakahuola muoyo wandi ye mene (Yone 10:18). “Kakuena muntu udi ne dinanga didi ditambe edi, dia muntu udi ufuila balunda bandi” (Yone 15:13).

mis.w: “Ekeleziya tshisumbu tshia bantu bakumbane, anyi anu nzubu.”
mis.t: Ekeleziya kena tshisumbu tshia “bansantu bakumbane” kadi tshia babi bafuidijibue. Nansha mupostolo Paulo wakadibikila ne, “bandi ku mpala kuabo ku bubi” (1 Timote 1:15). Ekeleziya wa kale wakatandangana ne wakaponaponaка kabidi (Bienzedi 6:1; 1 Kolinto 1:11). Kena muaba wa kuditumbisha, kadi bantu badi bafila dinanga divuabo bapeta (Yone 13:34-35).

love: Muyuki kawena ubangila ne dilumbuluisha kadi ne difuka dipongoloka mu dinanga.
Tshikondo tshiakenza bantu bubi, Nzambi wakalaya lusungu muaba au mene.
Nzambi wakakeba kumpala muntu uvua kayi mukumbane, wakamubikila ku dina diandi, wakamuvuisha tshijiba tshia disanka.
Wakumvua dikema dia bantu bavua bahika ne wakahuekela ye mene bua kubasungila.
Bamupanduka misangu ne misangu, kadi tshikondo tshionso pavuabo bela udi utuma musungidi ne ubabandisha kabidi.
Kakahua nansha Davidi muvua mupone, ne ku dîku diandi wakalaya mukelenge wa tshiendelele.
Kudi bantu bakamupingula nyima, uvua utungunuka kutuma baprofete, ulomba ne, “Pingana, ndalomba.”
Wakapuekela nabo nansha mu buloba bua mîdima bikole bua bupika, ne wakalaya dipingana.
Nansha kudi bantu bakapanga misangu ne misangu, kakangata mulayi wandi panyima, kadi wakabandisha kabidi.
Nansha munkatshi mua bidimu 400 bia dipuwa, mu disokoka, uvua ulongolola nshila wa lusungu.
Patutshivua bantu babi, wakatuma Muanende bua kuhuola muoyo wandi.
Dinanga dituvua bapeta, mpindieu udi ditumina ditangalake mu buloba bujima.
Ku ndekelu neakuhule binsonshi bionso ne neavuishe bionso bihia mu dinanga.

s.ui.footer: Bible mu Muvungu Umue · Mêyi a Bible adi afuma ku TSH
s.hero.kicker: KUBANGILA KU DIFUKA TOO NE KU EKELEZIYA
s.hero.title:
Bible,
mu muvungu umue
s.hero.sub: Mu muvungu umue, mona muyuki munene wa Bible — ne bua tshinyi Yesu wakalua.
s.thread.eyebrow: DÎYI DIMUE DIDI DISUIKA BIONSO HAMUE
s.thread.h2: Ku ndekelu, Bible udi muyuki umue patuhu
s.thread.note: Nzambi udi ulaya (tshipungidi), bantu badi bindila tshikondo tshile, ne ku ndekelu bionso bidi bikumbana ne bijika mu Yesu. Landa bibase 13 bidi panshi mu nshila eu — pesa “Bala bikuabo” ku tshikadidilu tshionso bua muyuki munene.
s.gospel.lead: Bible kena mukanda wa kulongesha “kuikala muntu muimpe.”
s.gospel.sublead: Mmuyuki wa muvua Nzambi, anu ku ngasa, musungile babi bavua kabayi mua kudisungila bobo nkayabo. Ku tshia munkatshi kudi kuimana Yesu Kilisto.
s.gospel.mirror:
Tshilengelu tshia Isalele tshidi kashidi tshimfuanyi tshia “meme”

Dishuena mpingu→Dikenga→Diela→Nzambi udi usungila→Dishuena mpingu kabidi…

Kubangila ku Balumbuluishi too ne ku bupika, Isalele udi upingana tshilengelu etshi kashidi. Bible kakatela edi bua tuetu tubaseke ne, “Bavua bantu ba tshianana.”

Ntshimanyinunu. Tshia ku mutshima kena “Isalele wakenza nanku” kadi “meme ndi nenza muomumue” (1 Kolinto 10:11).

Tshikishi kena anu tshimfuanyi tshia mutshi. Ntshintu tshionso tshitudi tunanga anyi tueyemena kuhita Nzambi — makuta, dipita, ditumbisha dia bantu, bantu, nansha meme nkayanyi. Ne kuangata Nzambi bu tshintu tshia kupetela tshindi nsua ntshikishi kabidi.

Ku ndekelu, tshikishi tshikole tshidi “meme nkayanyi mushikame ku nkuasa wa Nzambi.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: Nunku Nzambi udi usungila mubi eu munyi? Tshia ku mutshima tshia lumu luimpe ludi Bible wamba ke etshi.
s.gospel.crux:
Bible mujima udi uleja muaba umue.

Bantu kabavua mua kushiha tshilengelu tshia bubi bobo nkayabo, ne kakuvua muakane nansha umue. Nunku muntu kampanda uvua ne bua kufuta difutu muaba wabo.

Yesu kakaluila anu bua kufila dilongesha dimpe. Pakapangaye nshila mukuabo wa kunsungila, uvua ne bua kulua.

Muntu uvua ne bua kupopelelibua ku mutshi au uvua meme.
Yesu wakambula bubi buanyi wakapopelelibua muaba wanyi.

“Bakamutaha mputa bua mibi yetu, bakamukuma bua malu mabi etu … ne tuakukoleshibua ku mibundabunda yandi.” — Yeshaya 53:5
s.faq.h: Utshidiku ne tshintu tshikutshia mu mutshima?
s.faq.q1: ▸ Nunku mushipangani udi anu witabusha udi uya ku diulu, kadi muntu wakikala muimpe matuku ende onso kayi witabusha udi uya ku tshikoki?
s.faq.a1:
Ndilomba dilelela. Kadi mapambuka abidi adi masokoke munda muadi.

① Bible kawena ushiha bantu mu “bimpe ne bibi.” Tshipiminu kena “muimpe kuhita muntu mukuabo” kadi “butoke bukumbane bua Nzambi.” Ku mpala kuandi, kakuena muntu udi “muimpe bikumbane” (Lomo 3:23). Nunku edi kena “muntu muimpe ne mushipangani,” kadi bu bantu babidi badi ne disama dimue dia lufu — umue udi wangata buhaji, mukuabo udi ubuhidia, wamba ne, “Ndi ne bukole kuhita muntu au.”

② Tshintu tshimue patshitu tshidi tshishiha diulu ne tshikoki. Ki ndinombolo dia bienzedi, kadi bua witabusha Yesu Kilisto bu Mukelenge ne ditshiona dia bubi buebe dijidijibue. Eu udi ne bubi bujidijibue ku mashi a Kilisto udi uya ku diulu; eu udi kayi mumuitabusha, bubi buandi butshidiku, kena uya. Kakuena bienzedi bimpe bidi mua kujikija ditshiona dia bubi mene.

Nunku diulu ne tshikoki kabiena “difutu dia bienzedi bimpe” kadi bualu bua diumvuangana ne Kilisto. Ne “ditabusha” kadiena anu ditabuja dia meji kadi dishintuluka dia muntu udi ukokesha muoyo webe — yonso udi umuitabusha bushuwa kena udiamba kadi udi ukudimuna mutshima bikole. Bushuwa, didibingisha (“ndi muntu muimpe”) ntshikishi tshikole bikole bua kushiha, tshidi tshituvuija ne tuetu katuena dikengela Kilisto (Luka 18:9-14).

Bible udi wamba patoke: “Kabena balumbuluisha wamuitabusha, kadi bakumana kulumbuluisha wahidia kuitabusha” (Yone 3:18). Dilumbuluisha kadiena “diela dinombolo dia bienzedi biebe panyima pa lufu,” kadi diakajadika kabidi bua witabusha Kilisto.

Lomo 3:23 · Yone 3:18 · Efeso 2:8-9 · Luka 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Tshiena mua kuikala anu muntu muimpe kanyi muitabushe Yesu anyi?
s.faq.a2:
Ndi diela meji divule, kadi didi dipambuka ku “ditshiona dilelela.” Tuangate tshimfuanyi.

Fuanyikija ne udi mu buatu bua banyengi. Nansha musukula buatu bimpe munyi, muikale ne luse kudi bantu, muikale ne nsombelu muimpe — utshidi munyengi, bualu buatu budi bukuya nabo too ne muaba uvua buya (tshihebelu tshia dilumbuluisha). Ditshiona kena “dinombolo dia bienzedi biebe” kadi “buatu kayi udi nabo” (bunu buebe).

Nunku lumu luimpe kalena se “enza budikutshishi bua kuikala muimpe”; ludi luamba ne, “shintulukila buatu bukuabo.” Pueka ku buatu bua bubi ne ujabukile kudi Yesu — mu bunu buhia bua muana wa Nzambi. Edi kena dibandisha dinombolo diebe ku budikutshishi, kadi ditabusha Eu udi ukulambula tshianza ne dijabuka ku buatu buandi.

Bushuwa Bible udi uleja lusungu anu bu dishintululu edi — “wakatuhandisha ku bukokeshi bua mîdima, wakatubuesha mu bukelenge bua Muana wa dinanga diandi” (Kolosai 1:13).

Kupambuki: edi kadiena diamba ne nsombelu muimpe kawena ne mushinga. Buimpe kabuena “tshipungidi” tshia lusungu kadi tshimuma tshialu. Yonso mushintulukile buatu bukuabo mpindieu udi usombela bimpe ki mbua buowa kadi bua dinanga dia muana.

Kolosai 1:13 · Yone 1:12 · Yone 3:3 · Efeso 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Bikala mushipangani usomba ne ditalala, wamba ne “Nzambi wakanfuidija,” kadi mukengeshibue utshidi ukenga — kena lusangaa lua Nzambi lua tshianana bikole anyi?
s.faq.a3:
Dilomba ndilelela, ne dikenga ndilelela. Kadi diamba dia nanku kadiena “difuidija dia Bible,” kadi dipambuiсha diadi.

① Difuidija dia Nzambi kadiena dia tshianana. Bubi kabuena busokomeshibua bu se “kabuakenzeka”; Nzambi mene wakafuta difutu buabo ne muoyo wa Muanende. Mutshi kauena tshijadiki tshia se bubi mbuangatshibua bu bua patuhu, kadi tshia se bubi bunene nunku — difuidija dia mushinga munene kuhita adi onso a ha buloba.

② Dikudimuna mutshima dilelela didi dikuama bimuma. Bikala mushipangani usomba ne ditalala ku mpala kua mukengeshibue — “Nzambi wakanfuidija, ndi ne ditalala” — adi kadiena dikudimuna mutshima kadi dimfuanyangana diadi (Matayo 3:8). Ne difuidija pankatshi pa muntu ne Nzambi kadiena dijimija mputa ya mukengeshibue anyi dimuenzeja kufuidija.

③ Bubi kabuena anu “bualekibua.” Bubi buonso budi bufutshibua mu miaba ibidi — anyi Kilisto udi bubambula ku mutshi (bua badi bamuitabusha kakuena dilumbuluisha kabidi, Lomo 8:1), anyi udi umuhidia ku ndekelu udi bubambula yeye mene. Nunku kakuena “dipua mutshima dia tshianana.” Mushipangani udi kabidi ne dibanza ku mikenshi ya ha buloba (Lomo 13:1-4).

④ Binsonshi bia mukengeshibue kabiena bitekete ku mpala kua Nzambi. Nzambi udi udila ne badi badila, udi uvuluka tshinsonshi tshionso, ne ku ndekelu neakutshihule ye mene (Buakabuluibua 21:4). Nunku mukengeshibue kena ne bua kuambula bujitu bua dia disombuela ye nkayende, kadi udi mua kudifila kudi Nzambi muakane (Lomo 12:19 — “Busombuedi mbuanyi, meme nenfute; mudi muamba Mukelenge”).

Matayo 3:8 · Lomo 8:1 · Lomo 13:1-4 · Buakabuluibua 21:4
s.faq.q4: ▸ Bible udi bushuwa muyuki wa bulelela anyi? Udi umueneka bu tshiena-bukulu tshia kale anyi bu muyuki wa difunda.
s.faq.a4:
Lukonko ludi luakane — ne ludi luimba muaba muimpe wa kutuadijila. Mpata kayena tshiena-buena tshia ditabuja to, kadi mbukebi bua kukenkesha malu bimpe ne lulamatu. Bible kena tshiena-bukulu tshikese tshia "kuitabuja anu wewe musue" to, kadi mmukanda wa malu mafunda pa mutu pa miaba ya bushuwa, matuku, ne bantu ba bushuwa. Tangila anu bidienganyi bikese.

① Kena mukanda umuepele to, kadi "tshibutshilu tshia mikanda" — kadi udi uya pa tshiena-bualu tshimue. Bible mmasangisha a mikanda 66 mifunda mu bidimu bitue ku 1.500, kudi bafundi batue ku 40 — bakalenge, balami ba mikoko, baluki ba mishipa, mufutshishi wa bitadi, munganga, bantu ba mishindu mishilashilangane ne ba bikondo bishilashilangane, bafunda pa mbidile, kabayi bamanyangane, mu miakulu isatu (tshiena-Ebelu, tshiena-Alama, tshiena-Greke). Kadi bionso bidi bisangila, kabiyi ne tshidiakubidiakubi, pa tshiena-bualu tshimue: lupandu ku butuangaji bua Kilisto. Au mmumue muoyo udi ukolela bua kuwumvuija ne malu a tshialala anyi a butuangaji bua bantu.

② Udi utungunuka ne kujadikibua kufuma panshi (malu a kale a bantu). Malu a bungi avuabu bashipe bambe ne mmajingululbe, "adi atuilakaja anu mu Bible," akajadikibua panyima kudi midimu ya kumbusha bintu mu buloba. Tshikondo tshia bakalenge tshia Davidi ngakajadikibua ku dibue difunda ne "nzubu wa Davidi" (Dibue dia Tel Dan); Ponse Pilato, nguvena uvua mushipe Yezu, ngakajadikibua ku mufundu udi ne dîna diende; mushiku wa mâyi wa mukalenge Hezekiya (2 Bakelenge 20:20) ngakajadikibua ku mushiku au ne mufundu wende. Nansha bena Hete, bavuabu babikile ne "bantu ba mu meji," bakatumbuka bu bukalenge bunene mu bipangu.

③ Mmukanda muyamantshibue bimpe kupita yonso wa kale (mifundu ya bianza). Mu bungi bua mifundu ya bianza midi mishale, mu didiumvuangana diayi, ne mu tshikondo tshidi pankatshi pa difunda ne dyamantshila, Bible kena ne tshilumbu mu mikanda yonso ya kale. Mukanda wa Yeshaya wa kumpala kua Kilisto pankatshi pa Mifundu ya Mbuu wa Lufu (yakapetua mu 1947) wakitabangana ne mukanda mukumbane wa bidimu bitue ku 1.000 panyima, kabiyi anu pa dîyi ku dîyi — bujadiki bua ne: Bible wakalamibua bushuwa mu bikondo bionso.

④ Malu avuabu bafunde kumpala akenzeka anu nunku (mîyuki ya baprofete). Dipungila Dikulu, difunda bidimu bia bungi kumpala kua Yezu, didi diakula patoke bua kuledibua kuende mu Beteleheme (Mika 5:2), mupika udi ukenga (Yeshaya 53:5), ne malu a tshimfimfi (Misambu 22). Mmalu makumbane bikole bua kuamba ne mmalu a tshialala.

⑤ Bafundi ba malu a kale ba pambelu pa Bible bakafunda bualu ebu kabidi. Mufundi wa malu a kale wa bena Lomo Tasite ne mufundi wa malu a kale wa bena Yuda Yosefe — kabavua bena Kilisto nansha umue — badi batela Yezu, dishipa diende, ne ekeleziya wa kumpala. Pa mutu pa bionso, bayidi bavua bamuangalake bua buôwa bakafila mioyo yabu bua kumanyisha dibika ku lufu — kakuena muntu udi ufuila tshintu tshidiye mumanye ne ntshia mashimi to.

Bua kuamba bulelela, malu aa adi aleja ne: kuitabuja Bible kakuena dipanga dia meji to, kadi nkuakane; kaena "bujadiki" budi bukenga bu tshibumba tshia bidiabalu to. Nunku dishindika dia muena Kilisto kaditshi difumina ku bujadiki nkayabu to, kadi ku dishindika didi Nyuma Muimpe ufila mu mutshima pa ubala muntu Dîyi. Bible udi wamba ne — “Nunku ditabusha didi difuma ku diunvua, ne diunvua didi bua dî dia Kilisto.” (Lomo 10:17). Nunku nansha biobi bimueneka bu muyuki wa difunda bikole, kuubala wewe nkayebe nkutuadija. Bujadiki budi bunzulula tshiibi, ne dishindika didi dikola munda mua muntu udi ubala.

2 Bakelenge 20:20 · Yeshaya 53:5 · Mika 5:2 · Lomo 10:17
s.respond.sub: Dinanga edi kadiena bumanyi kadi dibikila. Bikala dinanga divua dipopelelibue muaba webe dilenge mutshima webe, samba disambila edi bitekete, mukolo ne mukolo.
s.respond.prayer:
Nzambi,

ndi nitabuja ne ndi mubi udi kayi mua kudisungila ye nkayande.

Ndi nitabuja ne Yesu wakafua ku mutshi bua meme ne wakabika.

Mfuidija mibi yanyi yonso, ne kubangila lelu ikala Mukelenge wa muoyo wanyi.

Ngangata bu muanebe, ne ungenzeje nsombele nsombelu muhia.

Ku dina dia Yesu ndi nsambila. Amene.
s.respond.after: Bikala musambile edi ne mutshima webe wonso, Bible udi wamba ne wewe walua muana wa Nzambi. Kawutshidi nkayebe — keba ekeleziya udi hehi ne wende njila wa ditabusha nabo hamue.
s.respond.read: Bala Bible wewe mwine — tuadija ne Yone
s.respond.verse: “Yeye wakaha bonso bakamuitabusha bukole bua kuluabo bana ba Nzambi, bobo mene badi bitabusha dina diandi.” — Yone 1:12 · Lomo 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
Nzambi umue,
ku muyuki umue,
udi utukeba ne
dinanga didi kadiyi dilekela.
s.closing.verse: “Kakuena lufu, kakuena muoyo … kakuena tshintu tshionso tshikuabo tshifukibua tshidi ne bukole bua kutuhandulula ku dinanga dia Nzambi didi mu Kilisto Yesu Mukelenge wetu.” — Lomo 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Ku muyuki eu, Mikenshi, Misambu, Baprofete, ne Mikanda bidi bisakidila “munyinyi.”
Mpindieu, mukanda kayi wunzulula, newumone muaba uudi mu muyuki.
s.about.line: Bilondele dimona dia buyuki bua lusungu, dia evanjelike ne diavuluibue didi bena Kristo ba bungi ba mu Kore bumvuangana.
